report_name: Manufacturing Sector Faces Precise, Targeted Attacks, SonicWall Reports

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Zhen ransomware family was observed targeting the manufacturing sector, which implies the use of data encryption to impact victim operations.

malware.name: Zhen
malware.description: A ransomware family observed generating 22.2 million hits against two devices within the manufacturing sector, suggesting a highly targeted, active incident.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2021-36260
vulnerabilities.description: A command injection flaw in Hikvision IP cameras that continued to generate a high volume of attacks in the manufacturing sector. It is used as an entry point to pivot from IT to OT networks.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2021-44228
vulnerabilities.description: The Log4j2 vulnerability was responsible for 13.8 million detection events on manufacturing networks, indicating its continued exploitation by attackers.

identities.name: Manufacturing Sector
identities.description: The industrial sector is experiencing a shift from high-volume to precise, targeted cyberattacks against converged IT/OT networks, and recorded the highest rate of SCADA attacks.

identities.name: Hikvision
identities.description: Vendor of IP cameras affected by CVE-2021-36260, which is being actively exploited in attacks against the manufacturing sector.

indicators.name: Suspicious IT to OT Network Traffic Pattern
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious IT to OT Network Traffic
id: 2b9e1a0f-8c7d-4b5e-9f6a-3d2c1b0a9e8d
status: experimental
description: Detects RDP or SMB traffic patterns indicative of lateral movement from IT workstations to OT assets like HMIs or PLCs.
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-22
references:
  - https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/sonicwall-research-finds-manufacturing-cybersecurity-at-a-breaking-point-as-factory-floors-and-corporate-networks-collide-302831538.html
tags:
  - attack.t0886
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: zeek
detection:
  selection:
    destination_port:
      - 3389
      - 445
  # Placeholder for IT/OT subnets. In a real environment, these would be defined.
  # filter_it_to_ot:
  #   source_ip: '192.168.1.0/24' # Example IT subnet
  #   destination_ip: '10.10.1.0/24' # Example OT subnet
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects RDP or SMB traffic that could indicate lateral movement from IT to OT networks, a tactic highlighted in the report.

indicators.name: Hikvision Camera Command Injection Attempt (CVE-2021-36260)
indicators.pattern:
title: Hikvision Camera Command Injection Attempt (CVE-2021-36260)
id: f8c7b6a5-4d3e-4c2b-1a09-8e7d6c5b4a3f
status: experimental
description: Detects web requests containing the URL path '/PSIA/Custom/IO/inputs/', associated with the Hikvision command injection exploit (CVE-2021-36260).
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-22
references:
  - https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/sonicwall-research-finds-manufacturing-cybersecurity-at-a-breaking-point-as-factory-floors-and-corporate-networks-collide-302831538.html
tags:
  - attack.t0819
  - attack.t1190
level: high
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/PSIA/Custom/IO/inputs/'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects web requests containing the URL path '/PSIA/Custom/IO/inputs/', which is associated with the Hikvision command injection exploit (CVE-2021-36260).

indicators.name: Log4j JNDI Injection Attempt (CVE-2021-44228)
indicators.pattern:
title: Log4j JNDI Injection Attempt (CVE-2021-44228)
id: a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4a90-8bcd-ef1234567890
status: experimental
description: Detects the 'jndi:ldap://' string pattern, a strong indicator of Log4j (CVE-2021-44228) exploitation attempts.
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-22
references:
  - https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/sonicwall-research-finds-manufacturing-cybersecurity-at-a-breaking-point-as-factory-floors-and-corporate-networks-collide-302831538.html
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: critical
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  keywords:
    - 'jndi:ldap://'
    - 'jndi:dns://'
    - 'jndi:rmi://'
  condition: 1 of them
indicators.description: Detects the 'jndi:ldap://' string pattern, a strong indicator of Log4j (CVE-2021-44228) exploitation attempts.
